design_philosophy.emotional_tone: The feeling of entering a private lounge. Dark, quiet, expensive, and attentive.
design_philosophy.visual_mood: Minimalist Grandeur. Deep shadows, metallic highlights, and cinematic lighting.

themes.strategy: Dark mode is the default experience. Light mode is a secondary option, primarily for high-glare environments or specific admin preferences.

primary.name: Luxury Gold
primary.usage: CTAs, Borders, Active States, Key Highlights

accent.name: Velvet Red
accent.usage: Error states, 'Urgent' notifications, Heart/Like interactions (used sparingly)

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Membership Tier names

body.usage: UI text, Forms, Data tables, Long form content

mono.usage: Membership IDs, Transaction Codes, QR Code labels

layout_strategy.spacing_scale: Tailwind default but shifted up (p-4 becomes p-6 or p-8)

grid_systems.marketing_hero: Bento Grid (Asymmetric) - Hero image takes 2/3, Quick Actions take 1/3
grid_systems.dashboard_admin: High Density Grid - 4 columns, tight gaps (gap-4)
grid_systems.dashboard_member: Card Grid - 2 or 3 columns, wide gaps (gap-8), focused on visual cards
grid_systems.mobile: Single column, comfortable stacking with p-6 padding

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-semibold rounded-none hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all uppercase tracking-widest text-sm px-8 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-primary/30 text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 transition-all rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-sm px-8 py-3

inputs.style: bg-secondary-700 border-b border-white/10 focus:border-primary rounded-none px-0 py-3 transition-colors placeholder:text-neutral-600 focus:ring-0
inputs.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-500 mb-1

membership_card.style: Glassmorphism with Gold border, dynamic shimmer effect on hover
membership_card.content: Member Name, ID, QR Code, Tier Level (Gold/Platinum), Expiry

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.03) on all dark backgrounds to prevent banding and add 'film' feel

rules: Gold text must only be used on very dark backgrounds (contrast ratio > 3:1).
Interactive elements must have a focus ring (use gold ring-offset-2).
Do not rely on color alone for status (use icons + text).

instructions_to_main_agent.routing: Use React Router. Public routes: /, /login, /register, /verify/:id. Protected routes: /dashboard/*, /admin/*, /telecaller/*.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_implementation: Wrap the entire app in a Layout component that handles the Dark Mode context (defaulting to dark).
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard_sidebar: Create a collapsible sidebar with golden active states. Use a thin gold line on the left of the active item.
instructions_to_main_agent.forms: Use Shadcn Form components but heavily customize them to match the 'Input Style' defined above. Remove rounded corners to standard 0 or sm.
instructions_to_main_agent.qr_code: Use 'react-qr-code' library. Render it inside a white square container with padding to ensure scanability against dark backgrounds.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
